texto: Circumstances are the seeds of literature.

texto: Sermons seldom convert sinners they sometimes goad them into more sin.
explicacao: Citação de Salvador de Madariaga sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Sermons seldom convert sinners they sometimes goad them into more sin.” articula reflexao, religion, sermons em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: On the one hand, it is in and through creative minds that the community fulfils itself at its best and reaches its highest forms; and on the other, it is from them that the community recovers the social substance with which it had nourished them, transfigured by their creative alchemy into a still higher social substance. The creative evolution of his community and his own creative evolution must always be the two earnest purposes of the individual. Its own creative evolution and that of the individuals in its midst must always be the two earnest purposes of the community.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Salvador de Madariaga sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “On the one hand, it is in and through creative minds that the community fulfils itself at its bes…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, art, creative, útil em momentos de reflexao.

texto: My knowledge of myself is direct, synthetic, from within outwards; my knowledge of other persons is indirect, analytical, from outside inwards. My knowledge of myself starts at the core; that of others at the crust.
explicacao: Citação de Salvador de Madariaga sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “My knowledge of myself is direct, synthetic, from within outwards; my knowledge of other persons …” articula reflexao, empathy, knowledge em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
